description_long: This is a classic convertible car with a deep navy blue exterior and a striking red interior. The front features a prominent chrome grille and rounded headlights, giving it a vintage, mid-20th-century American look. The side profile reveals elegant chrome trim lines and whitewall tires, enhancing its retro appeal. The open-top design exposes two rows of red leather seats, with a dashboard and steering wheel visible from above. At the rear, dual exhaust pipes and rounded taillights are present, along with a subtle chrome bumper. The overall build is low and elongated, emphasizing its sporty yet luxurious character.
description: A vintage navy blue convertible car with a red interior, chrome trim, and whitewall tires. It features an open top, classic grille, and dual exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, rounded headlights, and red seats.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, chrome trim, and whitewall tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dual exhaust pipes, rounded taillights, and the open red interior.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible chrome trim and whitewall tires.
